title: Vercel Production Promotion Tasks

approval.constraint: Approval permits the ordered rollout but does not waive any fail-closed task gate.

principles: Production is independent from Preview: proxy URL, bearer, Upstash binding and namespace, CodexOAuthSubject inputs, derived profile/lock/fence keys, cipher/key id, and OAuth profile must be distinct.
The completed Sendblue Preview proof is retained as Preview-only evidence; Sendblue Production enablement is the final task.
Trusted-local OAuth owns browser/PKCE/callback/plaintext-token handling; Vercel receives only encrypted profile material and exposes no OAuth route.
Production uses Deployment Protection, explicit Eve Vercel OIDC authentication, and the proxy's separate internal bearer boundary.
Evidence is sanitized: no values, prompt/output, PII, raw profile/ciphertext, headers, or protected URLs are committed.
Commit and push every accepted coherent slice before a deployment consumes it; deployment evidence must reference a clean pushed source revision.

implementationImprovementAuditCounter.description: Before acceptance, record distinct parent audits for ownership/call graph, Effect implementation quality/helper admission, and verification/evidence coverage. Add passes until all findings are resolved.

tasks.title: Revalidate the clean combined Codex Preview baseline
recoveryEvidence: 2026-07-14 recovery replaced only Preview runtime cipher entries with a newly generated sensitive BUNDJIL_CODEX_PROFILE_ENCRYPTION_KEY and BUNDJIL_CODEX_PROFILE_ENCRYPTION_KEY_ID, updated encrypted Preview proof-only copies, and moved BUNDJIL_UPSTASH_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX to a new isolated Preview namespace. No values were printed or written to tracked paths; BUNDJIL_CODEX_PROXY_MODE remained live and deployed proof mode was not enabled.

Trusted-local subscription provisioning and canonical stored-profile proof passed for the isolated Preview namespace: found, V2 envelope, ciphertext present, subscription profile, refresh capable, valid expiry, no reauthentication marker, and no plaintext marker leak were all true.

Immutable Preview proxy deployment dpl_BhiCBKKW4Ti4PZ5AA2Ukpv3uD3n5 and agent deployment dpl_CDuXrTdnGaiFKvSCo7nBreZ5aAYa are READY with source SHA f3a7d9c53b70de7b7772415bfef4bf8151446af3. Proxy proof passed health 200/live/ready, missing and invalid bearer 401, authenticated SSE 200 with two data lines and completion, plus false leak predicates. Staged refresh/fence proof returned all seven approved booleans true.

Protected Preview agent evidence: anonymous info returned 401; a fresh Vercel OIDC bearer plus a Preview-only automation bypass reached info 200 and a minimal session 202. The corresponding startIndex=0 replay returned 200 in sanitized runtime logs and the first session correlates to exactly one later proxy POST /v1/chat/completions 200. Parent replayed both existing session streams from startIndex=0: each produced exactly one of session.started, turn.started, message.received, step.started, message.appended, message.completed, step.completed, turn.completed, and session.waiting; reachesWaiting=true and reachesFailure=false. Curl timed out only because the durable stream remains open after waiting. The parent revoked the temporary Preview automation bypass through the Vercel protection-bypass API; four pre-existing bypass records remain unchanged. Local temporary files were removed. No Production state changed.
tasks.description: From one clean pushed SHA, deploy proxy then agent to Preview using encrypted target-scoped variables only and establish a new, correlated Eve-to-live-proxy baseline. This task does not mutate Production.
implementationNotes: Inspect only Preview variable names/targets and deployment metadata; do not print or pull values into tracked paths.
Deploy without --env, --build-env, shell-injected values, stale prebuilt output, or tracked pulled env files.
Use the existing proxy proof shape for health, missing/invalid bearer 401, authenticated SSE 200/content type, live readiness, encrypted profile proof, refresh/fence readiness, and sanitized logs.
Deploy the agent with the immutable accepted Preview proxy URL, use protected Eve info/session/stream replay from startIndex=0, and correlate exactly one proxy completion.
Keep the completed Sendblue Preview evidence unchanged; it is not a substitute for this Codex proof.
mandatoryVerification: No Production target, storage, profile, alias, variable, or webhook changes.

Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Verify immutable deployment ids, source SHA, target, live mode, auth/status/content type, Eve event counts, proxy correlation, and leak-safe logs without values.
Run focused proxy/agent/Codex OAuth checks and the global verification gate.
completionCriteria: One SHA has accepted immutable Preview proxy and agent deployments built only from encrypted Vercel variables.
The active plan and ledger contain sanitized proof evidence and three parent audit passes.

evidence: Parent pass 1 - ownership and call graph: verified both READY Preview deployments resolve to pushed SHA f3a7d9c, the agent references the accepted immutable proxy, the proxy remains live with the package-owned encrypted profile/refresh/lock/fence layers, and Vercel metadata shows no Production Bundjil variable, deployment, alias, storage, profile, webhook, or Sendblue mutation.

Parent pass 2 - implementation quality: reviewed the operational diff and existing proof programs against Effect ownership rules. No runtime source changed; trusted-local login, stored-profile, staged-refresh, proxy, and Eve boundaries continue to use Config, Redacted, Schema, Layer, Effect.gen/Effect.fn, and tagged errors without DTO mirrors, unsafe casts, manual JSON, or helper sprawl. Build warnings were classified: all five agent model-provider inputs were admitted by @bundjil/agent#build; warnings belonged to unrelated Marketplace aliases or upstream packages that must not receive app secrets.

Parent pass 3 - verification and evidence: focused package checks and bun run verification passed; build logs show successful Effect language-service patching and READY deployments; proxy health/auth/SSE, stored-profile ciphertext, staged refresh/fencing, anonymous rejection, protected info/session, nine-event startIndex=0 replay through session.waiting, exact proxy correlation, and leak predicates passed. The temporary Preview bypass was revoked and only sanitized identifiers/statuses/counts are recorded.

tasks.title: Implement read-only Production preflight and explicit Eve auth
completionEvidence: The agent now owns an explicit Eve channel policy with Vercel OIDC first and localhost-only localDev fallback. Tests prove a valid linked-project OIDC bearer is accepted, an anonymous deployed caller is rejected, and localDev does not authorize a deployed host.

The app-owned read-only preflight consumes only a mode-0600 sanitized metadata snapshot, validates personal scope, stable domains, Production-target variable names and security types, live proxy mode, Eve auth, Deployment Protection, disjoint opaque identity fingerprints, and rollback references, then emits only Effect Schema-encoded go/no-go evidence. It has no mutation, deployment, alias, variable-write, storage-provisioning, or profile-write capability.

Parent review corrected the variable policy to understand Vercel sensitive metadata and to reject plain-text bearer, cipher, and Upstash credential bindings. The positive CLI fixture emitted go true with no rejected checks; focused agent typecheck and 45 tests passed; the proxy retained 21 passing tests and its private route behavior; bun run verification, jq empty, and git diff --check passed. No Production state changed.
tasks.description: Add a schema-backed, read-only Production preflight and explicit deployed Eve authentication before any Production mutation.
implementationNotes: Set the app-owned Eve policy to eveChannel({ auth: [vercelOidc(), localDev()] }) and test Vercel OIDC acceptance, deployed anonymous rejection, and localhost-only localDev behavior.
Keep deployment preflight at the app/CLI boundary. Reuse AgentModelProviderConfig, CodexProxyConfig, CodexOAuthSubject, and package errors rather than defining Vercel/profile DTO mirrors.

Fail closed on wrong Vercel project/scope, missing target variable name/binding, Preview/branch/ad hoc proxy host, mock/local mode, missing route protection, shared derived namespace identity, or missing accepted rollback references.
Decode only the Vercel metadata fields needed for a sanitized go/no-go result; the command cannot deploy, alias, set variables, provision storage, or write profiles.
mandatoryVerification: Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Tests prove positive personal-scope preflight and every wrong-target, shared-namespace, stale-host, missing-auth, wrong-mode, and read-only rejection.
Direct HTTP tests prove Eve auth behavior and proxy health/private route policy; run focused checks and the global verification gate.
completionCriteria: A documented command returns only Schema-encoded sanitized go/no-go evidence.
The explicit Eve auth policy and route matrix are accepted with three parent audit passes.

evidence: Parent pass 1 - ownership and call graph: verified the explicit Eve policy remains in apps/agent/agent/channels/eve.ts, the preflight contract and operation remain app-owned, and the executable edge owns ConfigProvider, FileSystem, and Effect.runPromise. The domain operation imports only the owning AgentModelProviderMode contract and cannot call Vercel mutation, deployment, alias, storage, or profile APIs.

Parent pass 2 - implementation quality: reviewed the complete diff for flat Effect.fn/Effect.gen control flow, Config and Effect Platform FileSystem use, Schema-derived input/output and Schema JSON encoding, URL decoding, tagged error translation, and helper admission. The identity comparison and variable-policy functions each own a non-trivial directly tested policy. Removed the discovered metadata mismatch by admitting Vercel sensitive bindings only at explicitly allowed variables and rejecting plain secret downgrades. No process.env access, raw JSON helpers, unsafe cast, DTO mirror, manual provider reader, nested Effect.gen, or helper sprawl remains.

Parent pass 3 - verification and evidence: agent typecheck, Eve build, 45 tests, root lint/format, knip, all workspace typechecks/tests, bun run verification, jq empty, and git diff --check passed. The mode-0600 CLI fixture emitted Schema-encoded go true evidence; tests cover positive personal scope, wrong target/scope/read-only decoding, wrong projects/host/mode/provider, missing auth/protection/bindings/rollback, shared identity, and plain-text secret rejection. Worker direct HTTP evidence retained loopback info 200 and anonymous deployed-host 401; proxy health/private-route tests remain green.

tasks.title: Provision isolated Production storage, credentials, and OAuth profile
tasks.description: Use granted approval to create and prove the isolated Production Upstash/profile/lock/fence boundary, bearer, cipher/key id, subject, and trusted-local refresh-capable profile.
implementationNotes: Confirm a Production Upstash binding and namespace independently of Preview. Prove disjoint derived profile, refresh-lock, and fenced-commit identities without emitting keys or values.
Generate independent Production internal bearer and profile cipher; store them only as encrypted Production variables. Set an independent non-secret cipher key id and CodexOAuthSubject inputs.
Run only the package-owned trusted-local login/profile command and CodexStoredProfileProof. Browser, PKCE, callback, authorization code, and plaintext token stay local.

Record only approved encrypted-envelope/proof booleans, profile variant, generation/revision category, expiry horizon category, and cipher key id. Preserve the newest fenced generation; do not invent a downgrade path.
mandatoryVerification: Verify the ledger's granted approval before the first Production mutation and stop on any failed preflight condition.

Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Prove isolation, encrypted write/read, plaintext-marker absence, refresh readiness, lock/fence behavior, and sanitized failures with package tests plus the global verification gate.
completionCriteria: Production has its own encrypted refresh-capable profile and distinct credentials/namespaces.
The active plan records sanitized proof and three parent audit passes.

tasks.title: Deploy and accept the private Production Codex proxy
tasks.description: Deploy the proxy from the accepted SHA, prove its immutable deployment, then accept the stable Production alias before the agent can reference it.
implementationNotes: Use encrypted Production variables only. Reject mock/local mode, Preview host, API-key/Gateway fallback, wrong scope, or public completion access.
Prove health/readiness, missing and invalid bearer 401, authenticated SSE 200/content type, encrypted profile/readiness, refresh/fencing, clean logs, and alias-to-immutable-deployment resolution.
Record current and previous accepted immutable deployment ids and configuration version references for rollback, without secret values.
mandatoryVerification: No Production agent variable or deployment changes occur before this task is accepted.

Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Direct HTTP, log, profile/refresh, alias, leak, focused package, and global verification checks pass.
completionCriteria: The stable personal-scope Production proxy alias resolves to an accepted private live deployment.
Rollback references and three parent audit passes are recorded.

tasks.title: Deploy and prove the protected Production Eve agent
tasks.description: Configure the agent Production target with the accepted stable proxy alias and independent bearer, then prove a protected minimal Eve session through the Production proxy.
implementationNotes: Use encrypted Production variables only and confirm the scoped Turbo environment includes required model-provider inputs.
Use fresh Vercel OIDC for Eve info, create a minimal non-sensitive session, replay from startIndex=0 to a terminal state, and correlate exactly one proxy completion.
Reject anonymous Eve access, Gateway/mock/Preview fallback, stale proxy alias, and mismatched agent/proxy SHA/configuration evidence.
mandatoryVerification: Verify Deployment Protection and explicit Eve Vercel OIDC remain active with no anonymous production fallback.

Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Verify info/model, stream/status, proxy correlation, runtime logs, leak scans, focused checks, and the global verification gate.
completionCriteria: One protected Production Eve session reaches the accepted Production proxy and Codex provider.
Correlated source/deployment/config evidence and three parent audit passes are recorded.

tasks.title: Soak Production, validate monitoring, and drill rollback
tasks.description: Observe the Production release, validate sanitized signals and alerts, and execute the ordered rollback drill without profile-generation downgrade.
implementationNotes: Monitor deployment/source identity, mode/host/scope, health/completion status and latency, Eve terminal events, refresh/401/lock/fence/Upstash outcomes, and auth rejection rates.
Exclude prompts, outputs, headers, tokens, raw profile/ciphertext, PII, and bypass URLs from telemetry and evidence.

Drill disable external traffic, restore agent and matching configuration, restore proxy, preserve newest fenced profile generation, and rerun the minimal protected session proof. Document rotation/re-login separately.
mandatoryVerification: Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Synthetic failure coverage proves health, auth spike, storage failure, refresh/reauth, wrong mode/host/scope, rollback, and leak detection.
The soak interval and rollback drill finish on an accepted deployment/configuration with a passing session and no profile-generation downgrade; run the global verification gate.
completionCriteria: Sanitized monitoring/alert evidence and an exercised rollback runbook exist.
Three parent audit passes are recorded before any external channel is enabled.

tasks.title: Enable and prove Sendblue Production last
tasks.description: Promote the already Preview-proved Sendblue channel only after the Production platform has passed soak and rollback gates.
implementationNotes: Use the accepted Preview route/status/replay evidence as implementation baseline, not as Production proof. Provision independent Production Sendblue and replay-store configuration only now.

Keep Vercel protection bypass distinct from the independent sb-signing-secret route authentication. Preserve allowlist, opaque routing, atomic owner-fenced replay claims, and fail-closed storage behavior.

Prove the Production route matrix, one allowlisted inbound-to-delivered outbound path, sequential/concurrent replay suppression, clean logs, and disable/rollback procedure without recording content, number, handle, webhook URL, or credentials.
mandatoryVerification: Verify no Sendblue Production mutation occurred before this task and that its storage/credentials are independent of Preview.

Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Direct route/status, replay, provider delivery, log/leak, focused agent, and global verification checks pass.
completionCriteria: Production Sendblue is enabled only with independent platform and route credentials and verified replay protection.
The plan, Sendblue ledger, promotion ledger, and docs contain sanitized evidence and three parent audit passes.

tasks.title: Reconcile documentation, ledgers, and final evidence
tasks.description: Update current app, architecture, SPEC, ledger, and execution-plan state only after the corresponding Production evidence exists.
implementationNotes: Reconcile README, ARCHITECTURE, agent/proxy docs, Eve architecture, related Codex and Sendblue ledgers, and this active plan with actual production/test/CLI call graphs.
Scan for stale Preview-only claims, wrong scope/host/mode, raw JSON/manual DTO language, secrets, PII, protected URLs, ciphertext, and untracked runtime artifacts.
Keep commits disabled and do not claim a production capability without its recorded gate evidence.
mandatoryVerification: Verify docs match actual ownership and production/test/CLI call graphs.

Verify flat meaningful Effect.gen/Effect.fn flow; expected typed errors are handled in .pipe(...) with catchTag, catchTags, or mapError; contracts are canonical Effect Schema-derived; no unsafe casts, DTO mirrors, manual readers/mappers, raw JSON helpers, or trivial wrapper/helper sprawl.
Run stale/leak/task-ledger scans, focused checks, jq validation, git diff --check, and the global verification gate.
completionCriteria: Documentation states exactly what is live, proved, and gated with no secrets.
Every preceding task has three accepted parent audit passes and sanitized evidence.
